project_metadata.description: Modern glassmorphic single-page web portfolio for Shahd Rabia, Computer and AI student at Benha University, emphasizing Flutter/mobile dev and competitive programming background.
project_metadata.core_purpose: Showcase Shahd Rabia's skills, experience, and projects to boost personal branding and professional outreach.
project_metadata.target_audience: Recruiters, collaborators, tech community, future employers

pages.purpose: Personal web portfolio for Shahd Rabia to showcase background, skills, experience, projects, and contact links.
pages.description: Single-page (/' Home) glassmorphic portfolio, full viewport coverage, purple/indigo animated background gradient. 5 stacked glass sections: Hero (centered callout), About (left-just, bio), Education (card), Experience Timeline (vertical, all milestones), Projects (grid cards), Technical Skills (badges), Soft Skills (list), Contact (panel), Footer. Animations: smooth fade/stagger w/Framer. All sections anchor-linked, responsive stacking mobile, glass/blur used throughout, round corners, gradient borders, dark/white text, all info in cards. No backend/form. Minimal but rich visual layers.
pages.content_notes: Only 1 landing page: All sections as anchor jumpable divs below header, footer sticky. Hero with intro, About, Education, Timeline, Projects, Skills (tech and soft), Contact. All info hardcoded; no backend needed. Animation: fade-ins, staggered grid reveals. Mobile: column layout, stacking. No modals except for Project detail if room; else, description in cards.
data_needs: List of tech and soft skills

theme.interaction_style: hover glow, fade-in scroll, link underline on focus

components.description: Absolute-position transparent glass panel spanning top of viewport; left-aligned logo (Shahd Rabia, bold 2xl, white text, slight shadow), right-aligned nav quicklinks (jump to About, Experience, Projects, Skills, Contact; text-white, semi-bold, 16px, horizontal gap-6), padding-x-8 padding-y-4, glass blur:20px, z-50; sticky on scroll, subtle backdrop fade on hover.
components.purpose: Site-wide navigation bar, brand, shortcuts to page sections via anchor links.

components.description: Center-aligned vertical flex, min-h-70vh, main glass card (rounded-2xl, blur:20px, py-16 px-12, shadow-xl), top: Shahd Rabia (font-bold, 5xl, white), below: title (Flutter Developer & CS Student, 2xl, indigo-300), then location (Benha, Qalyubia, medium, gray-200), contacts (flex-row gap-4: phone, email, LinkedIn with icons, purple/indigo accent on hover), fade-in on load via Framer, animated gradient border glow.
components.purpose: Spotlight Shahd Rabia, highlight role/location, provide instant contact access.

components.description: Single glass panel, left-aligned, max-w-2xl mx-auto, pt-8 pb-6 px-10, title (About, bold indigo-400, 2xl), body (white text, regular, summary as bullet points), modern icon avatar top-left (blurred edge, high z-index), fade-in from left on scroll.

Glass panel card with Benha University logo (left, 60px), bolded university name (lg), role (Faculty name, gray-200), sub-details (level, dates, location) as compact 1-column grid. Shadow: indigo, rounded-2xl, border indigo-200/50%, padding-y-6 px-6, margin-y-6, fade-in up animation.

Vertical flex, glass background, wide left-indented accent bar (indigo gradient), dots show time points (indigo rings, shadowed), right-aligned panels with experience title (semi-bold, white, 18px), org/track/duration (gray-300, italic, 14px), subtle fade-in right/left as items appear. Spacing-8 between items. Responsive stacking on mobile.
components.purpose: Chronological view of key experiences and courses.

components.description: Responsive grid (1col mobile, 2col tablet, 2col+gap-10 desktop), each card: glassmorphic (rounded-2xl, shadow-2xl, blur:20px, border), project name (indigo/purple bold, 2xl), tech stack (sm, light indigo), brief features as bulleted list, animated button: 'Project Details' (opens modal w/ info), cards fade-in with staggered transition. Min-width: 300px.
components.purpose: Show off main projects with key tech/bullets, visual consistency.

components.description: Glass chip grid (flex wrap), labels: language/tools/concepts (pill-shaped, 24px min-w, indigo-200 text, semi-bold); each badge glassy with border-glow on hover, small icon left if space (e.g., C++, Python). Fade-in collective entrance animation.
components.purpose: Highlight technical expertise in concise, visual chips.

components.description: Simple glass panel box, vertical flex, left-aligned, bullet-pointed list (white, 18px), section title ('Soft Skills', bold 2xl, indigo, mb-2). Occasional subtle fade-in upwards animation.
components.purpose: Display human/people skills clearly and compactly.

components.description: Wide-centered glass panel (rounded-2xl, backdrop blur:20px, py-10 px-8), dark text on translucent indigo card, bold section title (Contact, 2xl, indigo), contact fields: email (w/copy icon, purple), phone (w/copy icon, indigo), LinkedIn (icon, purple hover). All items laid out vertically with adequate 16px gap. Fade-in on scroll, section jump on nav click.
components.purpose: Makes direct contact info very accessible.

components.description: Stretched full-width glassmorphic footer (py-4 px-6, rounded-b-2xl), left: copyright '© 2024 Shahd Rabia', right: quick anchor links (white, small, gap-5), subtle indigo bar at bottom, card shadow underneath. Stationary at page bottom, fade-in on load.
components.purpose: Legal/shortlinks, end of page visual closure.
